findings.justification: ajax_paginate() is reachable as a nopriv AJAX handler and performs only a frontend nonce check (UM()->check_ajax_nonce()), which any anonymous visitor can satisfy, with no current_user_can() capability check before firing arbitrary um_ajax_load_posts__* action hooks with attacker-controlled arguments.

$_REQUEST['args'] is passed to do_action() callbacks entirely unsanitized, giving an unauthenticated attacker full control over the $args array received by any um_ajax_load_posts__* hook implementation.

The ob_get_clean() output from um_ajax_load_posts__* hooks is sent directly via die() with no escaping (the developer's own @todo comment acknowledges WP_KSES was never applied), enabling stored or reflected XSS through hook output.
